v0.1.0-alpha.description:
The first public release of the Spark 3 Archipelago Randomizer.

# Changelog
- Added stage completion as checks
- Added explore, speed, and score medals as sanities
- Added shop as sanity
- Added shop items into item pool
- Added abilities into item pool
- Music Randomizer, randomizes music from the `apmusic` folder
- And more, this is the first release after all
v0.1.0-alpha.title: v0.1.0-alpha

v0.2.0-alpha.description:
# Spark 3 Archipelago v0.2.0-alpha

## Changelog
- Fixed a bug with double jumping near walls
- Overhauled how locations and rules are internally stored
- Added an option to disable Spark 2 Stages
- Added a mode to help lab check requirements
-  Added Coinsanity, each coin in the Collectathon stages is a check
v0.2.0-alpha.title: v0.2.0-alpha

v0.2.2-alpha.description:
# Changelog
- Internally set up a system for logical difficulty
- Add ability to toggle abilities while labbing
- Print debug information to the AP server while labbing
v0.2.2-alpha.title: v0.2.2-alpha

v0.2.3-alpha.description:
# Changelog
- Abilities can now be toggled in preferences while in Lab Mode
v0.2.3-alpha.title: v0.2.3-alpha

v0.3.0-alpha.description:
# Changelog
- Added a connection information screen in-game, use the X button on the save select to access it. MelonPreferenceManager is no longer needed
- Added 2 traps: Nightmare and Laser traps
- The APWorld will now error if you have incompatible options (for example, too many freedom medals)
- BUGFIX: Fixed the shop
- BUGFIX: Exhausted Magnet Dash now requires Dash
- BUGFIX: Mecha Madness now requires Combat
v0.3.0-alpha.title: v0.3.0-alpha

v0.4.0-alpha.description:
# Changelog
- Add "explore hunt" - Collect all explore medals for a check (and optionally put said medals into the item pool)
- Split Wall Jump and Wall Walk
- Move Utopia Shelter up to the rest of the stages
- Add the two vehicles, Car and Copter, as items
v0.4.0-alpha.title: v0.4.0-alpha

v0.4.1-alpha.description:
# Changelog
Text on the connection info screen now scales
Radar Scout shows locations of health and energy capsules (foreshadowing?)

Compatible with v0.4.0-alpha APWorld
v0.4.1-alpha.title: v0.4.1-alpha

v0.5.0-alpha.description:
# Changelog
- Shop moves are automatically added to the dpad (requires stage restart)
- Shop moves can now be equipped without the respective shop pages
- You now start with Radar Scout
- Coin Hunt: Shuffle the collectathon coins and receive a check when you get enough
- You can now require a certain percentage of level completions to unlock the next gate
- Items that require being in a stage will now wait until you get into a stage, with a 2 second delay between each item
- Extra Lives item for Utopia Shelter
- Flint Trap, spawns Flint on top of you
- Added permanent Perfect Combo and Score Multiplier items
v0.5.0-alpha.title: v0.5.0-alpha

v0.6.0-alpha.description:
# Changelog
- Endless Dive can now have checks, with each floor being shuffled around
- Enemy rando: Whenever an enemy spawns, it's replaced with a random enemy
- Battery Sanity: The 13 batteries across the car stages can now be checks
- Added an option for Fark and Sfarx locking Utopia Shelter
- Explore Medals can now be used to gate Utopia Shelter
- Speed and Score medals can now be used to lock gates
- The stages on the world map have been reorganized
- AP messages show up in game now
- Reorganized the YAML
v0.6.0-alpha.title: v0.6.0-alpha

v0.7.0-alpha.description:
# Changelog
- Added a tiny bit of foreshadowing in the YAML
- Begin work on redoing logic
- Parry is now randomized
- Added an in-game settings menu and inventory. Go into the database on the pause screen to access it
- Lab Mode abilities/gimmicks can be configured via the settings menu
- Moved some options from the YAML to the new settings menu
- Added arrows above checks denoting progressiveness (can be disabled)
- Added a tracking arrow above the player that can be configured in the settings
- Added in-game commands that can be put into any text client
  - `.whereis <check>` - Points the tracking arrow to the named check
  - `.whereindex <index> <sanity>` - Points the tracking arrow to the object that corresponds to the given sanity and index
- Added some keybinds when in lab mode
  - Keypad-0: Max out energy
  - Keypad-1: Cycle through characters
  - Keypad-2: Spawn a copter
- Internal reorganization

The next release after this one should hopefully be the start of the beta phase
Known Issue: Batteries can't be tracked and do not have colored arrows
v0.7.0-alpha.title: v0.7.0-alpha

v0.7.1-alpha.description:
# Changelog
- Added Death Link option in client settings
- Slightly modified the tracker arrow
- Added arrows above batteries
- Fixed tracker arrow pointing towards collected explore medals
- Fixed progression arrows not always being affected by settings
- Fixed lag when checking a location on a non-localhost server
- Fixed messages forever ascending
- Fixed messages not disappearing when game is paused
- Fixed connection error messages not appearing in-game (and they no longer appear in server chat)

Compatible with v0.7.0-alpha worlds

ok next ***major*** release will be beta
v0.7.1-alpha.title: v0.7.1-alpha
